About the lens

Behind every frame, a walk into the woods

I'm Chaithanya — I chase the hour right after the rain, when the canopy is still dripping and the light hasn't decided what it wants to be yet. This journal is where every photograph gets the story it deserves: where I stood, what it smelled like, what almost made me miss the shot.

Expect a lot of green, a lot of mist, and the occasional ruined pair of shoes.

— Chaithanya
